## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? Keep this focused on user impact. -->

-

## Related issues

<!-- Example: Closes #123 -->

-

## Type of change

<!-- PR title example: feat(catalog): add locale fallback badges -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `refactor` / `perf` — internal improvement without behavior change

## Test plan

- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] `dart format --set-exit-if-changed .`
- [ ] Example app/tests updated and passing (if `example/` changed)

## Localization / tooling

- [ ] Translation assets validated (`dart run anas_localization:anas_cli validate ...`)
- [ ] Dictionary/codegen regenerated (`dart run anas_localization:localization_gen`)
- [ ] Migration or CLI behavior documented

## Release notes

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] README or docs updated when setup/usage changes

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Optional: risks, rollout notes, screenshots, or follow-ups. -->
